description: The existing Asset record this internal-transfer row moves between branches (BNS keeps the same asset; it is not disposed/recreated).
label: BNS Transferred Asset
name: Delivery Note Item-bns_transferred_asset

description: Set while this asset is dispatched on an internal transfer but not yet received. Blocks a second dispatch.
label: BNS In Transit
name: Asset-bns_in_transit

description: Source branch Location captured at dispatch, used to restore location if the dispatch is cancelled.
label: BNS Pre-Transfer Location
name: Asset-bns_pre_transfer_location

description: Destination branch Location captured at dispatch, consumed by the receiver to complete the movement.
label: BNS Transit Target Location
name: Asset-bns_transit_target_location

description: Short code used in the BNS structured asset name (e.g. 'OE' -> KGOPL/OE/FA-01/001). Set once per category; cannot be changed after it is used.
label: Series Abbreviation (BNS Asset Naming)
name: Asset Category-bns_category_abbr

description: When enabled, negative stock will not be allowed for this warehouse even if 'Allow Negative Stock' is enabled in Stock Settings. This feature must be enabled in BNS Settings first.
label: Disallow Negative Stock
name: Warehouse-bns_disallow_negative_stock

description: Attach the supplier's MSME / Udyam registration certificate.
label: MSME Certificate
name: Supplier-bns_msme_certificate

description: When set, FSSAI License No. field becomes visible in Company Addresses.
label: Is a Food Company
name: Company-bns_is_food_company

description: Allowed ±% variance for component qty validation against BOM. Leave empty to use the default from BNS Settings.
label: Variance (%)
name: BOM Item-bns_variance_qty

description: Internal use: the cost_center this asset held before a BNS internal branch transfer moved it, so cancelling the receiving PR/PI restores it exactly.
label: BNS Pre-Transfer Cost Center
name: Asset-bns_pre_transfer_cost_center

description: When checked, Purchase Invoice/Receipt submissions for this supplier do not require Supplier Invoice No or Date.
label: Skip Supplier Invoice No/Date Requirement
name: Supplier-bns_skip_supplier_invoice_details

description: Exactly 12 numeric digits
label: e-Waybill No.
name: Purchase Receipt-bns_ewaybill_no

description: FSSAI License No. for this company address. Visible when linked Company has Is a Food Company checked.
label: FSSAI License No.
name: Address-bns_fssai_license_no

description: Date printed on the e-Waybill (required whenever the e-Waybill attachment is required).
label: e-Waybill Date
name: Purchase Receipt-bns_ewaybill_date

description: BNS transport mode for attachment enforcement. By Hand/By Cart skips the e-Waybill requirement; By Ewaybill (or blank) runs the threshold check.
label: Transport Mode
name: Purchase Receipt-bns_mode_of_transport

description: Attach the e-Waybill document (required when net total exceeds the threshold).
label: e-Waybill
name: Purchase Receipt-bns_ewaybill_attachment

description: Treat this credit note as a post-billing price discount: clears Delivery Note / Sales Order references on items so the source DN stays 100% billed, and forces Update Stock off.
label: Invoice Discount Credit Note
name: Sales Invoice-bns_is_invoice_discount_credit_note

description: Attach the supplier invoice document.
label: Supplier Invoice
name: Purchase Receipt-bns_supplier_invoice_attachment

description: Optional: Attach the transport builty or lorry receipt.
label: Builty / LR Copy
name: Purchase Receipt-bns_builty_attachment

description: Exactly 12 numeric digits
label: e-Waybill No.
name: Purchase Invoice-bns_ewaybill_no

description: Date printed on the e-Waybill (required whenever the e-Waybill attachment is required).
label: e-Waybill Date
name: Purchase Invoice-bns_ewaybill_date

description: BNS transport mode for attachment enforcement. By Hand/By Cart skips the e-Waybill requirement; By Ewaybill (or blank) runs the threshold check.
label: Transport Mode
name: Purchase Invoice-bns_mode_of_transport

description: Attach the supplier invoice document.
label: Supplier Invoice
name: Purchase Invoice-bns_supplier_invoice_attachment

description: Attach the e-Waybill document (required when net total exceeds the threshold).
label: e-Waybill
name: Purchase Invoice-bns_ewaybill_attachment

description: Optional: Attach the transport builty or lorry receipt.
label: Builty / LR Copy
name: Purchase Invoice-bns_builty_attachment

description: When checked, every Purchase Invoice for this supplier is submitted as fully paid using the Mode of Payment below — no separate Payment Entry required. Suitable for cash / imprest / walk-in vendors.
label: Auto-Paid Supplier (Cash / Imprest)
name: Supplier-bns_auto_paid_supplier

description: Mode of Payment used to auto-pay this supplier's Purchase Invoices. The cash/bank account is resolved from this Mode of Payment's company-wise Accounts table.
label: Auto-Paid Mode of Payment
name: Supplier-bns_auto_paid_mode_of_payment

description: Set this to auto-fill Customer Address from Location's Linked Address on save.
label: Billing Location
name: Delivery Note-billing_location

description: Set this to auto-fill Customer Address from Location's Linked Address on save (BNS customers only).
label: Billing Location
name: Sales Order-billing_location

description: Internal transfer valuation rate mirrored from source Delivery Note Item incoming_rate.
label: BNS Transfer Rate
name: Purchase Receipt Item-bns_transfer_rate

description: Stores source Sales Invoice Item name when PR is created from SI. Used for partial receipt tracking.
label: Sales Invoice Item
name: Purchase Receipt Item-sales_invoice_item

description: The existing Asset record this internal-transfer row receives. BNS does not auto-create a new asset for internal transfers.
label: BNS Transferred Asset
name: Purchase Receipt Item-bns_transferred_asset

description: Internal transfer valuation rate mirrored from source Sales Invoice Item for BNS internal flows.
label: BNS Transfer Rate
name: Purchase Invoice Item-bns_transfer_rate

description: The existing Asset record this internal-transfer row receives. BNS does not auto-create a new asset for internal transfers.
label: BNS Transferred Asset
name: Purchase Invoice Item-bns_transferred_asset

description: Set this to auto-fill Customer Address from Location's Linked Address on save.
label: Billing Location
name: Sales Invoice-billing_location

description: Per-document opt-in for direct DN -> PR conversion when company GSTIN and billing GSTIN differ. Stamped by the 'Submit as Diff GSTIN Internal Transfer' button only.
label: BNS Allow Diff GSTIN DN -> PR
name: Delivery Note-bns_allow_diff_gstin_dn_pr

description: User who flipped the diff-GSTIN DN -> PR opt-in.
label: BNS Diff GSTIN Enabled By
name: Delivery Note-bns_diff_gstin_enabled_by

description: Timestamp when diff-GSTIN DN -> PR opt-in was set.
label: BNS Diff GSTIN Enabled On
name: Delivery Note-bns_diff_gstin_enabled_on

label: Is Print GST Rate Per Row
name: Sales Invoice-custom_is_print_gst_rate_per_row

description: Stores linked Purchase Receipt when PR is created from SI (different GSTIN flow). Used for record connections.
label: BNS Purchase Receipt Reference
name: Sales Invoice-bns_purchase_receipt_reference
